name: vanhaven/project-gallery
title: VH Project Gallery
description: A mosaic project gallery that fetches images from VanHaven → Projects. Click any image for a magnified lightbox; Load More button with a 'Showing X of Y' counter.

subheading.default: Explore the artistry behind VSO. From hand-stitched leather to CNC-machined components, excellence is found in the smallest finishes.
